workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available concept-reference image directly as advisory-only broad palette/value/density evidence.
Static check passed for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with no validation errors.
Attempt 2 Playwright desktop preview succeeded and captured previews/attempt-002/002-world-environment-draft-desktop.jpg.
Attempt 2 render report shows healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, nonBlankRatio 0.999996, dynamicRange 159.667, and authored-world-environment-part shell behavior.

The screenshot shows a dominant full-surround position-space paper/wash environment with blue-violet color pressure, warm dirty-paper edges, black scaffold bars, red/yellow opposing pressure strokes, scratch hatching, and concentrated shallow-box tension.
Self-review confirms exactly one true enclosing skybox shell is authored; all other visible bars, planes, lines, and accents are ordinary non-enclosing scene geometry.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: the draft is a real world-environment module with one authored skybox shell carrying the dominant Carroll Dunham-derived atmosphere and non-literal protest pressure.
evidence.compositionAdaptation: Kept as the single enclosing shell; wider camera and lighter final grade keep it atmospheric rather than overpowering the central subject.
compositionAdaptations: Preserved moduleRef and empty assetRefs; kept as the single authored environment shell with radius 72 and a lighter, wider composition so the blue-violet paper wash supports rather than overwhelms the central subject.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available local concept-reference image directly and used it only as advisory support for broad palette, dense black hatching, saturated red/yellow/blue/violet accents, paper ground, and compressed shallow-stage mood.
